orig_text:
would be several years before
   ideas like mobile code, remote procedure calls, ActiveX, JAVA, and
   Representational State Transfer (RESTful) interfaces appeared.
correct_text:
would be several years before
   ideas like mobile code, remote procedure calls, ActiveX, Java, and
   Representational State Transfer (RESTful) interfaces appeared.
notes: Java doesn't stand for anything else. It's a name not an acronym.

orig_text:
[IETF1]    The MITRE Corporation, "Proceedings of the 16-17 January
              1986 DARPA Gateway Algorithms and Data Structures Task
              Force", IETF 1, January 1986,
              <https://www.ietf.org/old/2009/proceedings/prior29/
              IETF01.pdf>.
correct_text:
[IETF1]    The MITRE Corporation, "Proceedings of the 16-17 January
              1986 DARPA Gateway Algorithms and Data Structures Task
              Force", IETF 1, January 1986,
              <https://www.ietf.org/proceedings/01.pdf>.
notes:
The corrected text is a link to the proceedings of the first IETF meeting as taken from the Past Meetings section of the IETF web site.

***RFC Editor Note:***
The URL was correct at the time of publication; it looks like a redirect was not included when a website reorg happened. We filed an issue to hopefully get the redirect in place (see https://github.com/ietf-tools/red/issues/294). We will remove this errata report once the redirect is in place.
